# function: cidr_subtract

Returns the set of CIDRs that remain after removing all addresses covered by the `exclude` list from the `input` list. The result is merged into the smallest equivalent set.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_subtract(input list of string, exclude list of string) list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `input` (List of String) The base list of CIDRs to subtract from.
1. `exclude` (List of String) The list of CIDRs to remove from the input.
